'''ngatozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kheddah|kheddah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kheddah|kheddah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngatozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngætezheth|ngætezheth]] || [[word:ngætezhej|ngætezhej]] || [[word:ngætezhesh|ngætezhesh]] || [[word:ngætezhe|ngætezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngatotozhoth|ngatotozhoth]] || [[word:ngatotozhoj|ngatotozhoj]] || [[word:ngatotozhosh|ngatotozhosh]] || [[word:ngatotozho|ngatotozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngatozhoth|ngatozhoth]] || [[word:ngatozhoj|ngatozhoj]] || [[word:ngatozhosh|ngatozhosh]] || [[word:ngatozho|ngatozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngatofzhoth|ngatofzhoth]] || [[word:ngatofzhoj|ngatofzhoj]] || [[word:ngatofzhosh|ngatofzhosh]] || [[word:ngatofzhof|ngatofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngatozhotho|ngatozhotho]] || [[word:ngatozhojo|ngatozhojo]] || [[word:ngatozhosho|ngatozhosho]] || [[word:ngatozhoko|ngatozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngatozhoth|ngatozhoth]] || [[word:ngatozhoj|ngatozhoj]] || [[word:ngatozhosh|ngatozhosh]] || [[word:ngatozho|ngatozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngatozhothol|ngatozhothol]] || [[word:ngatozhojol|ngatozhojol]] || [[word:ngatozhoshol|ngatozhoshol]] || [[word:ngatozhokol|ngatozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngatozhothotho|ngatozhothotho]] || [[word:ngatozhojojo|ngatozhojojo]] || [[word:ngatozhoshosho|ngatozhoshosho]] || [[word:ngatozhoko|ngatozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngatozhothon|ngatozhothon]] || [[word:ngatozhojon|ngatozhojon]] || [[word:ngatozhoshon|ngatozhoshon]] || [[word:ngatozhokon|ngatozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngatozhothoro|ngatozhothoro]] || [[word:ngatozhojoro|ngatozhojoro]] || [[word:ngatozhoshoro|ngatozhoshoro]] || [[word:ngatozhokoro|ngatozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
